steps.title: Pin down the goal
steps.content: The student wants to explain what Psydrax odorata is. The relevant notes describe it as a flowering shrub and as one of the native species in Oahu, Hawaii.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
B states directly: "Psydrax odorata is a flowering shrub species that is native to Oahu, Hawaii" — a clean definition.

A and D describe what was done with the seeds (not what the plant is). C is about non-native plants generally, not Psydrax odorata.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
